mapper.insert: INSERT INTO photo (id, photo_type, photo_name, photo_size, photo_format, sort_order, photo_status) VALUES (#{id}, #{photoType}, #{photoName}, #{photoSize}, #{photoFormat}, #{sortOrder}, #{photoStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM photo WHERE photo_type = #{photoType} AND photo_name = #{photoName}
mapper.update: UPDATE photo SET photo_status = #{photoStatus}, oss_url = #{ossUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO photo (id, photo_type, photo_name, photo_size, photo_format, sort_order, photo_status) VALUES
(#{photo.id}, #{photo.photoType}, #{photo.photoName}, #{photo.photoSize}, #{photo.photoFormat}, #{photo.sortOrder}, #{photo.photoStatus})
